benefits.description: Real progress against lipodermatosclerosis over two months, almost all wood-like texture of skin gone
Skin all over is softer and smoother, bigger floppy skin bits starting to shrink
Noticeable glow after about a month

side_effects.description: Severe burning/stinging sensation at injection site described as giant murder hornet sting; user is hypersensitive to copper ions; mitigated by adding extra BAC water and mixing with BPC-157
Unable to sleep from injection site pain after taking 2mg first dose
Elevated copper levels possible if daily dosing without zinc supplementation; recommends zinc picolinate supplement

protocol_notes: Uses GHK subcutaneously, stacks with BPC-157 in syringe to reduce sting. Also supplements with collagen peptides (bulk bovine collagen powder), Vitamin C, bio-silica, and zinc picolinate. Uses red light therapy. Recommends starting at 250 mcg for first dose. Effective dose range considered 2-3 mg; no real benefit beyond that. Also mentions topical cosmetic-grade GHK-Cu mixed with sterile water and hyaluronic acid. Lost over 60 lbs prior to use.
